title: prestonia portobellensis
intro: Prestonia portobellensis, also known as "cancer bush", is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote the killing of cancer cells. Its health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even show promise in combating certain types of cancer. Prestonia portobellensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal medicine to support the body's natural healing processes.
